exercises.title: Key Rate Calculator
exercises.description: Implement comprehensive key rate calculations for multiple protocols.
tasks: Implement binary entropy and mutual information
Compare rates for different QBER values
Plot key rate vs QBER showing threshold
exercises.expectedOutput: Key rate analysis tool with finite-size effects
hints: R = 1 - h(e) - f·h(e) for perfect EC

exercises.title: Attack Model Simulator
tasks: Model PNS attack on weak coherent pulses
Calculate Eve's information for each attack
hints: Eve info bounded by disturbance caused
Plot I_E vs QBER for different attacks

exercises.title: Composable Security Analyzer
tasks: Calculate composable key length from finite data
hints: Parameter estimation adds O(√(log(1/ε)/n)) to QBER bound

exercises.title: Protocol Security Comparison
exercises.description: Compare security properties of different QKD protocols.
tasks: Calculate thresholds for BB84, Six-state, E91
Analyze robustness to different attack types
hints: E91 uses Bell violation for security
